plugins.name: getting-started
plugins.description: Skills for first-time setup, local testing, doctor, updates, and removal of @mmaappss/sync in consumer projects.

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git workflow commands for AI agents: commit staged files, craft message, push with guards.

plugins.name: mmaappss
plugins.description: Driver plugin: sync local marketplaces and plugins for Claude, Cursor, and Codex; rules, skills, and scripts to run, enforce, and audit the system.

plugins.name: npm-release
plugins.description: Rules and skills for publishing @mmaappss/sync to npm: version bump, dist-tag, and release steps. No release tool; npm version + npm publish only.

plugins.name: pino-logger
plugins.description: Pino logging strategy, rules, and skills for debugging mmaappss sync and tooling.
